{{Quote|This is a beautiful sight, Reti| Jedi Master Adi Gallia|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''</ref>}}
The '''Ruby Nebula''' was a [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] located in the [[Karthakk system]]. The nebula's three suns gave local space a ruby-red tint, hence the name, Ruby Nebula. The density of the nebula's stars was known to disrupt starship sensors, making it easy for spy ships and starfighters—and even larger vessels such as landing craft and patrol interceptors—to remain hidden amid the free-floating asteroids.

[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] met [[Nym/Legends|Nym's]] informant, [[Reti]], in the Ruby Nebula while attempting to set up a meeting with the pirate captain. Reti was [[Skirmish in the Ruby Nebula|followed]] to the area by [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]], disgorged from a [[C-9979 landing craft/Legends|Trade Federation landing craft]]. Gallia and Reti destroyed the fighters, the landing craft and a [[Sabaoth Squadron spy ship]], and continued on to [[Maramere]].
